## Checklist

- [ ] No new TypeScript errors
- [ ] Relevant tests added / updated
- [ ] RLS policies updated for any new tables
- [ ] Rate limiting considered for any new public API routes
- [ ] PostHog events added for any key user actions
- [ ] Environment variables documented in `.env.example` if added
